title: Soccer dreams kick off early
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The eight-year-old Indiphile Barens’ face lit up with joy last Friday when he received an early Christmas gift at Formosa Primary School.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The eight-year-old Indiphile Barens’ face lit up with joy last Friday when he received an early Christmas gift at Formosa Primary School."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This young soccer fan was surprised with a donation of soccer equipment by local entrepreneur Malick Mpunjo, a businessman and hair stylist from Tanzania who also sells sports gear.","html":"This young soccer fan was surprised with a donation of soccer equipment by local entrepreneur Malick Mpunjo, a businessman and hair stylist from Tanzania who also sells sports gear."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Thank you so much, sir, this is very nice!” was about all Indiphile could muster as he smiled from ear tot ear upon receiving his gift."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His class teacher, Brunique Jansen, described him as a hardworking learner facing significant challenges at home.","html":"His class teacher, Brunique Jansen, described him as a hardworking learner facing significant challenges at home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
